name: Novgorod Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the rivers and lakes of the Novgorod land
purity and the heritage of Novgorod the Great

description: A flag with a blue vertical stripe along the hoist, occupying roughly one quarter of its length, and a white field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Novgorod Oblast.
history: Adopted on 26 March 2008 by the Novgorod Oblast Duma; the central emblem reproduces the historic Novgorod arms used since 1781.

features.symbolism: the blue hoist stripe represents the Volkhov River and the waters around Veliky Novgorod; the white field stands for purity and the spiritual heritage of Novgorod the Great.

features.role: coat of arms of Novgorod Oblast
features.symbolism: a golden throne with a red cushion bearing a triple candlestick, flanked by two black bears, with two silver fish below; based on the historic seal of the Novgorod land.
